---
title: Talks
description: "Invited talks, seminars, and keynotes by Dr Justin C Yang in psychiatric epidemiology, causal inference, mental health data science, and open science."

output:
  html_document:
    keep_md: yes
---
Dr Yang is available for invited talks, seminars, and keynotes in psychiatric epidemiology, causal inference, mental health data science, and open science. [Contact](../contact/) to enquire.

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE, results='asis'}
library(tidyverse)
library(glue)

talks <- read_csv('talks.csv') |> mutate(Date = as.Date(Date))

upcoming <- talks |> filter(Date >= Sys.Date()) |> arrange(Date)
past <- talks |>
  filter(Date < Sys.Date(), Date >= Sys.Date() - (365 * 3)) |>
  arrange(desc(Date))

if (nrow(upcoming) > 0) {
  cat("## Upcoming\n\n")
  upcoming |>
    mutate(Date = format(Date, "%d %B %Y")) |>
    pmap(function(Host, Title, Event, Date, ...) {
      glue(
        '<div class="talk-card">',
        '  <div class="talk-meta">{Date} &middot; {Host}</div>',
        '  <div class="talk-title">{Title}</div>',
        '  <div class="talk-event">{Event}</div>',
        '</div>'
      )
    }) |>
    paste(collapse = "\n") |>
    cat()
  cat("\n\n")
}

if (nrow(past) > 0) {
  cat("## Past\n\n")
  past |>
    mutate(Date = format(Date, "%d %B %Y")) |>
    pmap(function(Host, Title, Event, Date, ...) {
      glue(
        '<div class="talk-card">',
        '  <div class="talk-meta">{Date} &middot; {Host}</div>',
        '  <div class="talk-title">{Title}</div>',
        '  <div class="talk-event">{Event}</div>',
        '</div>'
      )
    }) |>
    paste(collapse = "\n") |>
    cat()
}
```
